reasoning: At 1x the frame collapses into an unreadable thin smear — silhouette fails the sticker test entirely. At 4x the golden rope/woven border has genuine personality and reads clearly on dark bg, but the white interior nearly disappears against the cream light bg, breaking contrast on one of two required backgrounds. The aesthetic is more 'Zelda treasure chest' than 'round soft friendly toy' — adventurous rather than cute. Corner accent details (red tips, blue jewel dots) add micro-charm but are invisible at 1x. Passes neither the clarity bar (1x failure) nor the full charm bar (wrong warmth register). Borderline marginal leaning toward fail on the cute/charm axis.
